creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Installing port devel/pcsc-lite informs the administrator/installer about installing the following port:

"... You need to install a driver for your smartcard reader e.g.,
- devel/libccid
- security/ifd-slb_rf60"

The latter port security/ifd-slb_rf60 can not be found in the recent /usr/ports tree as of the 23rd of September, anno 2021, time of the emission of this message.
